notes: Runs out of the Box. But has issues with Inputs (Both Mouse and Controller (XBox One Controller) Inputs). Some inputs are not recognized at all or are recognized very slowly.. Which is very frustrating in Local Multiplayer/Party-Matches.
title: Rayman Raving Rabbids™

notes: Only displays a black screen, even with: "PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 PROTON_OLD_GL_STRING=1 PROTON_LOG=1 PROTON_FORCE_LARGE_ADDRESS_AWARE=1 PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%", all 32bit libs are installed
title: Rayman Raving Rabbids™

notes: runs perfectly fine after you turn the gamma to where the black screen goes away in the settings menu. there may be audio issues when skipping cut scenes. but other than that it runs good. I'll dig deeper into the game when I speedrun it soon
title: Rayman Raving Rabbids™
